qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Missing authentication on all API endpoints by default when OS_SECURITY_KEY is unset
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: Different root cause: this finding concerns AgentOS authentication being disabled when OS_SECURITY_KEY is unset, not attacker-controlled field_type reaching eval() in FunctionCall processing.

qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: eval() on LLM-controlled field_type enables arbitrary code execution in agent tool processing
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: Same root cause as the advisory: attacker-influenced FunctionCall user_input_fields field_type values are passed to eval() in Agno model/tool processing, enabling arbitrary Python code execution.

selected_finding.title: eval() on LLM-controlled field_type enables arbitrary code execution in agent tool processing

target_advisory_judgement.reason: The selected qualifying finding identifies the advisory-described Agno field_type eval() root cause, and the copied PoC executed successfully under .judge, producing attacker-controlled filesystem effects through the vulnerable eval() paths.
evidence: Advisory GHSA-77rh-m34w-rv36 describes arbitrary Python code execution in Agno before 2.3.24 when attacker-controlled FunctionCall field_type is passed to eval().

eval_code_injection/vulnerability_report.json identifies eval(data["field_type"]) in libs/agno/agno/tools/function.py and eval(field_type) in libs/agno/agno/models/base.py as the vulnerable source-to-sink condition.

.judge/poc_runs/eval_code_injection/run.log shows the verifier confirmed eval() on field_type in function.py and models/base.py, then created /tmp/evohunt_eval_rce_proof and /tmp/evohunt_eval_rce_proof_alt through attacker-controlled eval() payloads.
.judge/poc_runs/eval_code_injection/poc_execution.json records command execution with exit_code 0 and timed_out false.

poc_executions.observed_effect: The copied verifier reached the Agno field_type eval() paths and created proof files via attacker-controlled Python payloads, including /tmp/evohunt_eval_rce_proof and /tmp/evohunt_eval_rce_proof_alt with content eval_rce_confirmed.
